revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:天活玉命]]
{{Infobox deity | name = Ame-no-Ikutama-no-Mikoto | kami_kind = {{ill|Tenjin|ja|天津神|lt=Tenjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/matsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Amatsukami|1=Amatsukami|2=zh|3=天神 (日本神話)|4=fr|5=Amatsukami|6=mni|7=ꯑꯃꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | full_name = Ame-no-Ikutama-no-Mikoto | alias = {{ill|Akitama-no-Mikoto|ja|活魂命|lt=Akitama-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akitama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Akitama-no-Mikoto|ja|活玉命|lt=Akitama-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akitama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Ikuhimo-no-Mikoto|ja|伊久魂命|lt=Ikuhimo-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikuhimo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天活玉命|1=Ame-no-Ikutama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q97184246}}, {{ill|Seisanrei-shin|ja|生産霊神|lt=Seisanrei-shin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seisanrei-shin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天活玉命|1=Ame-no-Ikutama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q97184246}}, {{ill|Seirei-shin|ja|生霊神|lt=Seirei-shin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seirei-shin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | divine_Rank = | divine_aspect = | mausoleum = | father = | mother = | parent = | spouse = | child = | palace = | shrines = {{ill|Hachigoden|ja|八神殿|1=Hasshinden|lt=Hachigoden|lt=Hasshinden|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachigoden|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasshinden|qq=}}, {{ill|Susu Kizumi Shrine (Chikuma City)|ja|須須岐水神社 (千曲市)|lt=Susu Kizumi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susu Kizumi Shrine (Chikuma City)|qq=}}, etc. | mythology = | related_clans = {{ill|Mishimakatsunushi|ja|三嶋県主|lt=Mishimakatsunushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mishimakatsunushi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, {{ill|Onchi Jiminushi|ja|恩智神社|lt=Onchi Jiminushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onchi Jiminushi|1=Onji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11492258}}, {{ill|Nittambe Clan|ja|新田部氏|lt=Nittambe Clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nittambe Clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | gender= {{ill|male|qid=Q6581097|1=Male (gender)}} | offspring= {{ill|Futodama|qid=Q11059539|1=Futodama}}; {{ill|Q110120205|qid=Q110120205|1=Ame no Mikudaru}} | relatives= {{ill|Kamo Taketsunomi|qid=Q11634939|1=Kamotaketsunumi no Mikoto}} }} '''Ame-no-Ikutama-no-Mikoto''' (天活玉命) is a {{ill|Deity|en|Deity|qid=Q178885|lt=kami|1=Deity}} appearing in [[Japanese mythology]]. In the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|qid=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}}, this deity is referred to as '''Ikutama no Kami''' (生霊神), while the {{ill|Kujiki|en|Kujiki|qid=Q2716751|lt=Sendai Kuji Hongi|1=Kujiki}} uses the name '''Ikutama no Mikoto''' (活玉命). He is venerated as an important deity in the {{ill|Hasshinden|ja|八神殿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasshinden|qq=}}. The {{ill|Kojiki-den|en|Kojiki-den|qid=Q11410835|lt=Kojikiden|1=Kojiki-den}} identifies him with the deity {{ill|Tsunugui and Ikugui|lt=Tsunugui and Ikugui|lt=Ikukushi no Kami|ja|活杙神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikukushi no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ツヌグイ・イクグイ}}. According to the {{ill|Kujiki|en|Kujiki|qid=Q2716751|lt=Sendai Kuji Hongi|1=Kujiki}}, Amatsu Ikutama no Mikoto was one of the 32 deities who accompanied {{ill|Nigihayahi no Mikoto|ja|饒速日命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ|1=Nigihayahi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10949054}}, and he is considered an ancestor of the Nittabe clan. The {{ill|Shinsen Shōjiroku|en|Shinsen Shōjiroku|qid=Q1045362|lt=Shinsen Shōjiroku|1=Shinsen Shōjiroku}} identifies him as an ancestor of the {{ill|Onchi Kannushi|ja|恩智神主|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onchi Kannushi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.<ref>「河内国 神別 天神 恩智神主」『新撰姓氏録』、弘仁六年。</ref> In the {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|qid=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}}, during the {{ill|Jinshin War|en|Jinshin War|qid=Q2378252|lt=Jinshin War|1=Jinshin War}}, it is said that the High Chief of Takichi, {{ill|Takichi Kouno|ja|高市許梅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takichi Kouno|1=Takechi no Kome|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11669864}}, suddenly lost his ability to speak. After three days, he was possessed by a deity who proclaimed, "I am the deity residing at the Takichi Shrine, {{ill|Kotoshironushi|en|Kotoshironushi|qid=Q8009611|qid=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}}, and also the deity residing at the {{ill|Ikukunitama Shrine|lt=Ikukunitama Shrine|lt=Ikutama Shrine|ja|生霊神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutama Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." The deity instructed the offering of horses and various weapons to the mausoleum of Emperor {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|qid=Q200188|lt=Jimmu|1=Emperor Jimmu}} and claimed to have accompanied Emperor {{ill|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Tenmu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q335181}} to protect him during his journey. == Overview == In the '''Nihon Shoki''' (『日本書紀』), he is known as '''Seirei-shin''' (生霊神), and in the '''Sendaikyuji Honki''' (『先代旧事本紀』), he is known by the alias '''Akitama-no-Mikoto''' (活玉命). He is also worshipped as an important deity in {{ill|Hachigoden|ja|八神殿|1=Hasshinden|lt=Hachigoden|lt=Hasshinden|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachigoden|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasshinden|qq=}}. In '''Kojiki Den''' (『古事記伝』), there is a theory that equates him with {{ill|Tsunugui and Ikugui|lt=Katsuragami|ja|活杙神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsunugui and Ikugui|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ツヌグイ・イクグイ}}. In the '''Sendaikyuji Honki''' (『先代旧事本紀』), he is regarded as one of the thirty-two gods who accompanied {{ill|Narahasuhiko-no-Mikoto|ja|饒速日命|lt=Narahasuhiko-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Narahasuhiko-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ニギハヤヒ|1=Nigihayahi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10949054}}, and is considered the ancestor of {{ill|Onchi Jiminushi|ja|恩智神社|lt=Onchi Jiminushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onchi Jiminushi|1=Onji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11492258}} and the {{ill|Nittambe Clan|ja|新田部氏|lt=Nittambe Clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nittambe Clan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In '''Shinsen Sei Shiryo Roku''' (『新撰姓氏録』), he is described as the ancestor of {{ill|Onchi Jiminushi|ja|恩智神社|lt=Onchi Jiminushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onchi Jiminushi|1=Onji Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11492258}}.<ref>「河内国 神別 天神 恩智神主」『新撰姓氏録』、弘仁六年。</ref> According to the '''Nihon Shoki''' (『日本書紀』), during the {{ill|Jinshin War|en|Jinshin War|qid=Q2378252|lt=壬申の乱|qq=|1=Jinshin War}}, {{ill|Takai Kogume-no-Mikoto|ja|高市県主許梅|lt=Takai Kogume-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takai Kogume-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高市許梅|1=Takechi no Kome|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11669864}}, the lord of [[:en:Takaichi District, Nara|Takai-gun}}, suddenly lost his speech and became unable to speak. Three days later, a god appeared to Kogume and said: "I am the {{ill|Kotoshironushi|en|Kotoshironushi|qid=Q8009611|lt=Jidai-no-kami|1=Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto}} at {{ill|Takai-sha|ja|高市社|lt=Takai-sha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takai-sha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. I am also the {{ill|Seirei-shin|ja|生霊神|lt=Seirei-shin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seirei-shin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} at {{ill|Misasa-sha|ja|身狭社|lt=Misasa-sha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Misasa-sha|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}." "I offer horses and various weapons at the mausoleum of {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|qid=Q200188|lt=Jimmu Tennō|1=Emperor Jimmu}}." "I stood before and after {{ill|Tenmu Tennō|ja|Emperor Tenmu|1=Emperor Tenmu|2=ja|3=天武天皇|lt=Tenmu Tennō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmu Tennō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q335181}}'s grandson, and after sending to {{ill|Fuwa District, Gifu|en|Fuwa District, Gifu|qid=Q521316|lt=Fuwa-gun|1=Fuwa District, Gifu}}, I have returned. Now I am appearing within the imperial army to protect it." "Armies are approaching from the west. Be vigilant." He is said to be the descendant of {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大御神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|lt=Amaterasu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天照大神}}'s child {{ill|Tenninugohine-no-Mikoto|ja|天津日子根命|lt=Tenninugohine-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenninugohine-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ|1=Amatsuhikone|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10940228}} according to '''Kojiki''' (『古事記』) and '''Shinsen Sei Shiryo Roku''' (『新撰姓氏録』). {| class="wikitable" |+ ! ! |- | colspan="2" |{{ill|Hasshinden|ja|八神殿|lt=Hasshinden|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasshinden|qq=}} |- |{{ill|Seikokon Shrine (Nara Prefecture)|ja|生国魂神社 (奈良県)|lt=Seikokon Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seikokon Shrine (Nara Prefecture)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|qid=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture|1=Nara Prefecture}}, {{ill|Kashihara, Nara|en|Kashihara, Nara|qid=Q496319|lt=Kashihara City|1=Kashihara, Nara}}, {{ill|Okubo Town (Kashihara City)|ja|大久保町|lt=Okubo Town|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okubo Town (Kashihara City)|1=Okubo Town|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11432038}}) |{{ill|Ikukunitama Shrine (Nara)|ja|生国魂神社 (奈良県)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikukunitama Shrine (Nara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Kashihara, Nara|en|Kashihara, Nara|qid=Q496319|lt=Kashihara|1=Kashihara, Nara}}, Nara Prefecture) |- |{{ill|Isonokami Shrine|en|Isonokami Shrine|qid=Q708859|lt=Ishikami Jingu|1=Isonokami Jingū}} – within the grounds, seven subsidiary shrines ({{ill|Tenri, Nara|en|Tenri, Nara|qid=Q502196|lt=Tenri City|1=Tenri, Nara}}, {{ill|Furu Town|ja|布留町|lt=Furu Town|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Furu Town|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 丹波市町|1=Tanbaichi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17174555}}) |{{ill|Isonokami Shrine|en|Isonokami Shrine|qid=Q708859|lt=Isonokami Shrine|1=Isonokami Jingū}} - Seven Shrines ({{ill|Tenri, Nara|en|Tenri, Nara|qid=Q502196|lt=Tenri|1=Tenri, Nara}}, Nara Prefecture) |- |{{ill|Shuku Shrine|ja|祝神社|lt=Shuku Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shuku Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}, {{ill|Nagano (city)|en|Nagano (city)|qid=Q128849|lt=Nagano City|1=Nagano (city)}}, {{ill|Matsushiro Town|ja|松代町|lt=Matsushiro Town|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsushiro Town|1=松代町|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11529236}}) |{{ill|Iwai Shrine (Nagano)|ja|祝神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwai Shrine (Nagano)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Nagano (city)|en|Nagano (city)|qid=Q128849|lt=Nagano|1=Nagano (city)}}, Nagano Prefecture) |- |{{ill|Susu Kizumi Shrine (Chikuma City)|ja|須須岐水神社 (千曲市)|lt=Susu Kizumi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susu Kizumi Shrine (Chikuma City)|qq=}} ({{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}, {{ill|Chikuma, Nagano|en|Chikuma, Nagano|qid=Q179757|lt=Chikuma City|1=Chikuma, Nagano}}, Oaza Yashiro) |{{ill|Susukigawa Shrine (Matsumoto)|ja|須々岐水神社 (松本市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susukigawa Shrine (Matsumoto)|1=Susukigisui Shrine (Matsumoto City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11664481}} ({{ill|Chikuma, Nagano|en|Chikuma, Nagano|qid=Q179757|lt=Chikuma|1=Chikuma, Nagano}}, Nagano Prefecture) |- |{{ill|Hassho Shrine (Tainai City)|ja|八所神社 (胎内市)|lt=Hassho Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassho Shrine (Tainai City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Niigata Prefecture|en|Niigata Prefecture|qid=Q132705|lt=Niigata Prefecture|1=Niigata Prefecture}}, {{ill|Tainai|en|Tainai|qid=Q877266|lt=Tainai City|1=Tainai}}) |{{ill|Yasojinja Shrine|ja|八所神社 (胎内市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasojinja Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Tainai|en|Tainai|qid=Q877266|lt=Tainai|1=Tainai}}, Niigata Prefecture) |- |{{ill|Sugawara Shrine (Joetsu City)|ja|菅原神社 (上越市)|lt=Sugawara Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara Shrine (Joetsu City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Niigata Prefecture|en|Niigata Prefecture|qid=Q132705|lt=Niigata Prefecture|1=Niigata Prefecture}}, {{ill|Jōetsu, Niigata|en|Jōetsu, Niigata|qid=Q582289|lt=Joetsu City|1=Jōetsu, Niigata}}, Kiyasa District) |{{ill|Sugawara Shrine (Joetsu)|ja|菅原神社 (上越市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara Shrine (Joetsu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Jōetsu, Niigata|en|Jōetsu, Niigata|qid=Q582289|lt=Joetsu|1=Jōetsu, Niigata}}, Niigata Prefecture) |- |{{ill|Takase Shrine|en|Takase Shrine|qid=Q3791906|lt=Takase Shrine|1=Takase Shrine (Nanto)}} ({{ill|Toyama Prefecture|en|Toyama Prefecture|qid=Q132929|lt=Toyama Prefecture|1=Toyama Prefecture}}, {{ill|Nanto, Toyama|en|Nanto, Toyama|qid=Q646805|lt=Nanto City|1=Nanto, Toyama}} Takase) |{{ill|Takase Shrine|en|Takase Shrine|qid=Q3791906|lt=Takase Shrine|1=Takase Shrine (Nanto)}} ({{ill|Nanto, Toyama|en|Nanto, Toyama|qid=Q646805|lt=Nanto|1=Nanto, Toyama}}, Toyama Prefecture) |- |{{ill|Keta Taisha|en|Keta Taisha|qid=Q11129340|lt=Kita Omote Shrine|1=Keta Taisha}} ({{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|en|Ishikawa Prefecture|qid=Q131281|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}, {{ill|Hakui, Ishikawa|en|Hakui, Ishikawa|qid=Q822585|lt=Hakui City|1=Hakui, Ishikawa}}, Terugeta Town) – formerly considered a main deity |{{ill|Keta Taisha|en|Keta Taisha|qid=Q11129340|lt=Keta Taisha|1=Keta Taisha}} ({{ill|Hakui, Ishikawa|en|Hakui, Ishikawa|qid=Q822585|lt=Hakui|1=Hakui, Ishikawa}}, Ishikawa Prefecture) |- |{{ill|Mononobe Shrine|ja|物部神社|lt=Mononobe Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mononobe Shrine|1=Mononobe Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11570698}} ({{ill|Shimane Prefecture|en|Shimane Prefecture|qid=Q132751|lt=Shimane Prefecture|1=Shimane Prefecture}}, {{ill|Ōda, Shimane|en|Ōda, Shimane|qid=Q384796|lt=Ota City|1=Ōda, Shimane}}, Kawai Town) |{{ill|Mononobe Shrine|ja|物部神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mononobe Shrine|1=Mononobe Shrine (disambiguation)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11570698}} ({{ill|Ōda, Shimane|en|Ōda, Shimane|qid=Q384796|lt=Ōda|1=Ōda, Shimane}}, Shimane Prefecture) |- |{{ill|Hatori Gorei Shrine|ja|御霊神社 (藤沢市羽鳥)|lt=Mitama Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitama Shrine (Fujisawa City Hatori)|qq=}} ({{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}, {{ill|Fujisawa, Kanagawa|en|Fujisawa, Kanagawa|qid=Q386661|lt=Fujisawa City|1=Fujisawa, Kanagawa}}, Hatori 3-chome) |{{ill|Goryō Shrine (Fujisawa)|ja|御霊神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goryō Shrine (Fujisawa)|1=Goryo Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11489356}} ({{ill|Fujisawa, Kanagawa|en|Fujisawa, Kanagawa|qid=Q386661|lt=Fujisawa|1=Fujisawa, Kanagawa}}, Kanagawa Prefecture) |- |{{ill|Omiya Shrine (Iwade City)|ja|大宮神社 (岩出市)|lt=Omiya Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omiya Shrine (Iwade City)|qq=}} ({{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|en|Wakayama Prefecture|qid=Q131314|lt=Wakayama Prefecture|1=Wakayama Prefecture}}, {{ill|Iwade, Wakayama|en|Iwade, Wakayama|qid=Q579623|lt=Iwade City|1=Iwade, Wakayama}} Miyagi) |{{ill|Ōmiya Shrine (Iwade)|ja|大宮神社 (岩出市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōmiya Shrine (Iwade)|1=Omiya Shrine (Iwade City)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11434451}} ({{ill|Iwade, Wakayama|en|Iwade, Wakayama|qid=Q579623|lt=Iwade|1=Iwade, Wakayama}}, Wakayama Prefecture) |- |{{ill|Yaho Shrine|ja|八保神社|lt=Yaho Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yaho Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}, {{ill|Akō District, Hyōgo|en|Akō District, Hyōgo|qid=Q1042141|lt=Akaho District|1=Akō District, Hyōgo}}, {{ill|Kamigōri, Hyōgo|en|Kamigōri, Hyōgo|qid=Q1155179|lt=Kamigori Town|1=Kamigōri, Hyōgo}}) |{{ill|Yaho Shrine|ja|八保神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yaho Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Akō District, Hyōgo|en|Akō District, Hyōgo|qid=Q1042141|lt=Akō District|1=Akō District, Hyōgo}}, Hyōgo Prefecture) |- |{{ill|Bitchū-no-kuni Sōjagū|ja|備中国総社宮|lt=Bitchū-no-kuni Sōjagū|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bichu Kosa Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Okayama Prefecture|en|Okayama Prefecture|qid=Q132936|lt=Okayama Prefecture|1=Okayama Prefecture}}, {{ill|Sōja|en|Sōja|qid=Q873536|lt=Sōja City|1=Sōja}} Sōja) |{{ill|Bitchū-no-kuni Sōjagū|ja|備中国総社宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bitchū-no-kuni Sōjagū|qq=}} ({{ill|Sōja|en|Sōja|qid=Q873536|lt=Sōja|1=Sōja}}, Okayama Prefecture) |- |{{ill|Itsukushima Shrine|en|Itsukushima Shrine|qid=Q191763|lt=Itsukushima Shrine|1=Itsukushima Shrine}} ({{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|en|Hiroshima Prefecture|qid=Q617375|lt=Hiroshima Prefecture|1=Hiroshima Prefecture}}, {{ill|Hatsukaichi|en|Hatsukaichi|qid=Q736897|lt=Hatsukaichi City|1=Hatsukaichi}}, Miyajima Town) |{{ill|Itsukushima Shrine|en|Itsukushima Shrine|qid=Q191763|lt=Itsukushima Shrine|1=Itsukushima Shrine}} ({{ill|Hatsukaichi|en|Hatsukaichi|qid=Q736897|lt=Hatsukaichi|1=Hatsukaichi}}, Hiroshima Prefecture) |- |{{ill|Omusubi Shrine|ja|大麻神社|lt=Omusubi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Omusubi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|en|Kagawa Prefecture|qid=Q161454|lt=Kagawa Prefecture|1=Kagawa Prefecture}}, {{ill|Zentsūji, Kagawa|en|Zentsūji, Kagawa|qid=Q191300|lt=Zenzenji City|1=Zentsūji, Kagawa}}, Omusubi Town) |{{ill|Ōasa Shrine|ja|大麻神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōasa Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Zentsūji, Kagawa|en|Zentsūji, Kagawa|qid=Q191300|lt=Zentsūji|1=Zentsūji, Kagawa}}, Kagawa Prefecture) |- |{{ill|Okada Shrine|ja|岡田宮|lt=Okada Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okada Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|qid=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}}, {{ill|Kitakyushu|en|Kitakyushu|qid=Q188806|lt=Kitakyūshū City|1=Kitakyushu}}, Yahatanishi Ward) |{{ill|Okada Shrine|ja|岡田宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okada Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Kitakyushu|en|Kitakyushu|qid=Q188806|lt=Kitakyūshū|1=Kitakyushu}}, Fukuoka Prefecture) |} * == References == {{Reflist|qq=}}
